E1 — email given (gmail): agent spells CONFIRM_FORMAT
EC1 — email correction 'double m': inserts extra M, does not drop P
EC2 — email correction 'no P': removes P, all other letters stay
EC3 — email correction 'B not P': swaps one letter, all others stay
N1 — first name only given: agent asks for last name
N2 — full name given: agent confirms spelling
N3 — name confirmed: agent proceeds to email question
N4 — name correction: agent asks for spelling of corrected part
NC1 — name re-spell: agent confirms corrected spelling without dropping letters
P1 — booking party correction: no name given, booking_other intent
P2 — booking party correction: name follows, patient_name_raw in payload
S1 — cancel escape mid-collection
S2 — wrap-up signal mid-collection
S4 — financial enquiry: agent speaks billing question (no tool call)
S5 — financial enquiry agreed: callback_request
S6 — financial enquiry declined: wrap_up
S7 — speak to practitioner: agent offers email relay (no tool call)
V1 — constraint pivot: time change → change_time intent + STOP
V2 — constraint pivot: practitioner change → change_practitioner + STOP
X1 — execute: calls smart_router after full collection
X2 — execute failure: agent says error message after smart_router fails
